heading: Notice of strikes and lockouts to applicants
label: 49j Notice of strikes and lockouts to applicants
text: In carrying out the provisions of this chapter the Secretary is authorized and directed to provide for the giving of notice of strikes or lockouts to applicants before they are referred to employment.
notes: Amendments1998—, which directed the substitution of “Secretary” for “Director”, was executed by making the substitution for “director” to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 105–220, § 307(2), redesignated subsec. (b) as entire section and struck out subsec. (a) which provided for establishment and composition of a Federal Advisory Council, and similar State advisory councils, to work on problems relating to employment.Pub. L. 105–220, § 307(1)1982—Subsec. (a). inserted provision that nothing in this section should be construed to prohibit the Governor from carrying out functions of the State advisory council through the State job training coordinating council in accordance with .Pub. L. 97–300section 1532(c) of this title
Effective Date of 1998 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , formerly set out as a note under .Pub. L. 105–220section 311 of Pub. L. 105–220section 49a of this titleJuly 1, 1999

Effective Date of 1982 AmendmentAmendment by effective , but with Secretary authorized to use funds appropriated for fiscal 1983 to plan for orderly implementation of amendment, see , which was formerly classified to .Pub. L. 97–300section 181(i) of Pub. L. 97–300section 1591(i) of this titleOct. 1, 1983
